fields.name: Standard Task Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the standard task code.
The program automatically retrieves the standard task code from the Code field in the Standard Task table.
The program uses the standard task code to link the standard task tools with the standard task.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the line number.
The program numbers the lines sequentially and uses the numbers to keep track of the different standard task tool lines.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description for the tool, such as the name or type of the tool.
